hazard_description: Operatives working on mezzanine floor without edge protection. Risk of falling 4m to concrete below.
activity: Picking stock from upper level racking
existing_controls: Safety harness policy in place; signage posted
further_controls: Install permanent edge guarding and safety netting; mandatory harness inspection log

hazard_description: Exposed live conductors on aging distribution board during routine maintenance tasks.
further_controls: Replace distribution board; implement lockout/tagout procedure

hazard_description: Repeated lifting of 25kg concrete blocks without mechanical aids. Workers reporting back pain.
existing_controls: Manual handling training completed; team lifting encouraged
further_controls: Provide mechanical lifting aids (vacuum lifter); reduce block weight specification

hazard_description: Unguarded nip point on conveyor belt. Operator clothing could become entangled.
existing_controls: Guards present on main rollers; training delivered
further_controls: Fit interlocked guard on exposed nip point; add emergency stop at workstation

hazard_description: Employees working 8+ hours on laptops without docking stations. Reports of neck and wrist strain.
further_controls: Provide docking stations and external monitors; schedule mandatory screen breaks via software

hazard_description: Inadequate ventilation when handling isopropyl alcohol in bulk. Risk of vapour inhalation.
further_controls: Install local exhaust ventilation; review substitution with less hazardous solvent

hazard_description: Yard surface deteriorating with potholes and standing water after rain. Forklift and pedestrian shared route.
existing_controls: Hi-vis vests mandatory; speed limit signs posted
further_controls: Resurface yard; implement pedestrian segregation barriers; improve drainage

hazard_description: Combustible materials (timber offcuts) stored adjacent to site office. No fire extinguisher within 10m.
existing_controls: Fire evacuation plan in place; weekly checks
further_controls: Relocate storage 6m from office; install extinguisher; conduct fire warden refresher

hazard_description: Staff reporting high workload and lack of managerial support during organisational restructure.
further_controls: Implement workload review meetings; train line managers in mental health first aid

hazard_description: Damaged racking upright following forklift impact. Structural integrity not confirmed. Risk of collapse.
existing_controls: Area cordoned off with tape; incident reported
further_controls: Commission structural survey immediately; replace damaged upright before reopening aisle
